name: Wireless Headphones Pro
description: Premium wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life and active noise cancellation.

name: Bluetooth Speaker Mini
description: Compact waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 12-hour playtime and 360-degree sound.

name: 4K Smart TV 55-inch
description: 55-inch 4K UHD Smart TV with HDR10+, built-in streaming apps, and voice control.

name: HDMI Cable 6ft
description: High-speed HDMI 2.1 cable supporting 8K resolution and 48Gbps bandwidth.

name: Smart Watch Series 5
description: Advanced smartwatch with health monitoring, GPS, 5-day battery life, and swim-proof design.

name: Laptop Stand Adjustable
description: Ergonomic aluminum laptop stand with 6 height settings, compatible with laptops up to 17 inches.

name: Men's Casual T-Shirt
description: Soft 100% organic cotton crewneck t-shirt available in multiple colors. Machine washable.

name: Men's Jogger Pants
description: Comfortable slim-fit jogger pants in soft fleece fabric with elastic waistband and zip pockets.

name: Running Shoes
description: Lightweight responsive running shoes with breathable mesh upper and cushioned midsole.

name: Athletic Socks 3-Pack
description: Moisture-wicking cushioned athletic socks with arch support, sold in packs of 3 pairs.

name: Phone Case - iPhone 15
description: Military-grade drop-protection clear case for iPhone 15 with MagSafe compatibility.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Insulated 32oz stainless steel water bottle keeping drinks cold 24 hours or hot 12 hours.

name: Throw Pillow Set 2-Pack
description: Decorative throw pillows in velvet fabric with removable covers. Set of 2, 18x18 inches.

name: Yoga Mat Premium
description: Non-slip 6mm thick TPE yoga mat with alignment lines and carrying strap. Eco-friendly material.

name: Resistance Bands Set
description: Set of 5 resistance bands ranging from light to extra heavy for full-body workouts.

name: Coffee Maker Deluxe
description: 12-cup programmable coffee maker with built-in grinder, thermal carafe, and auto-shutoff.

name: Coffee Grinder
description: Burr coffee grinder with 18 grind settings for espresso, drip, French press, and cold brew.

name: Stand Mixer Pro
description: 5.5-quart stand mixer with 10 speed settings, dough hook, flat beater, and whisk attachments.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with silent clicks, 2.4GHz connectivity, and 12-month battery life.

name: USB-C Hub 7-Port
description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with 4K HDMI, 100W PD charging, 3x USB-A, SD and microSD card readers.
